channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Narvacan honors basketball player Dwight Ramos during homecoming event
item.description: Narvacan, Ilocos Sur recently celebrated the homecoming of Dwight Ramos, a prominent basketball player known for his participation in local and international tournaments. The event highlighted the pri...

item.title: Possible Early Israeli Elections Unlikely to Alter Core Policies Toward Palestinians
item.description: The article examines the political implications of the Israeli Knesset's vote to dissolve itself and potentially trigger early elections. The measure, introduced on May 20 and supported by 110 members...

item.title: ICC asked to reassess Duterte’s medical fitness ahead of trial
item.description: Humingi ang abogado ni dating Pangulong Rodrigo Duterte sa International Criminal Court (ICC) na magsagawa ng panibagong pagsusuri sa kalusugan ng kanyang kliyente upang matukoy kung siya ay fit na hu...

item.title: Ontario Provincial Police investigate two separate boating incidents on the same northern Ontario lake
item.description: The Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) responded to two separate marine incidents that occurred on the same lake in northern Ontario, prompting a significant emergency response involving local officers, ...

item.title: BuzzFeed Challenges Readers to Identify Famous Movie Musicals in a Timed Trivia Quiz
item.description: BuzzFeed published an entertainment-focused trivia quiz created by staff writer Sara Thompson that tests readers' knowledge of well-known movie musicals. The quiz features a selection of titles drawn ...

item.title: Arsenal celebrate Premier League title with open-top bus parade despite PSG defeat
item.description: Arsenal marked a triumphant end to their domestic season by holding a celebratory open-top bus parade in London to honour their Premier League title win, even as they recently suffered a defeat to Par...

item.title: Critics Question ICC Over Focus on Israel While Ignoring Iran's Attacks
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) is facing criticism for what many perceive as selective justice in the Middle East. While the Court has rapidly pursued investigations into Israel's military ope...

item.title: Tony Abbott Returns as Liberal Party President: Implications for Australian Politics
item.description: Former Australian Prime Minister Tony Abbott has re-emerged in national politics following his loss in the 2019 ‘teal’ wave. Abbott, who has remained a public figure since leaving parliament, has now ...

item.description: Health authorities in the Democratic Republic of Congo have expanded Ebola testing efforts as the number of confirmed cases has risen to 260, while experts warn that the full extent of the outbreak re...

item.title: Ralph Cu remains prepared after strong semifinal performances for Barangay Ginebra in the PBA

item.title: Shooting near Watts vigil leaves one woman dead and another injured
item.description: Early Sunday morning, a shooting near a candlelight vigil in Watts resulted in one woman dead and another injured. According to the Los Angeles Police Department, officers responded to reports of gunf...

item.title: Essendon enter uncertain coaching transition under Dean Solomon amid ongoing leadership debate

item.title: Over 200 injured and one dead after PSG Champions League celebrations in Paris
item.description: More than 200 people were injured and one person died in Paris following Paris Saint-Germain’s second consecutive UEFA Champions League victory, according to France’s interior ministry. The club secur...

item.title: Nigeria to Boost Beekeeping and Livestock Development Under NL-GAS
